title: Five Eyes issues 'unprecedented' warning over China's aggresive spying campaign
summary_full: Chinese intelligence operatives are reportedly using fake job offers on professional platforms to ensnare government and military personnel.  The Five Eyes alliance warns these tactics aim to extract sensitive information, with targets pressured to provide confidential details for financial rewards.  Western nations urge vigilance against these sophisticated espionage efforts.
